svg.text: PHASE 4 — CARGO BAY GONDOLA + WINCH CRADLE
© 2026 Steve Griffing PE(CSE) CISSP-ISSEP CPP · CC BY 4.0
NACELLE TILT — −5° TO 140° · LONGITUDINAL AXIS DATUM
Existing MG90S servo retained (9g, full torque adequate for 145° total range).
Reprint tilt_bracket_140deg.stl — extended slot with dual hard-stop bosses at −5° and 140°.
FC soft limits: outdoor 0°–90°; BRAKE mode 0°–120°. Max tilt rate: 20°/s brake, 10°/s transition.
Print cargo_gondola_shell.stl + 2× clamshell_door_half.stl in PETG 40% infill.
Print cargo_cradle_autolatch.stl in PETG 100% infill. Test latch springs — box click-in/click-out.
Remove hull belly panel C. Cut gondola opening 108×82mm in belly skin.
Apply 5-min epoxy to gondola shell flange. Press onto hull opening. Clamp 30 min.
Install 3mm CF hinge pins (×2) through clamshell door knuckles and gondola flanges.
Mount SG90 door servo on gondola top bracket. Connect push-pull linkage rods to each door half.
Install N20 winch motor + DRV8833 on inner gondola back wall. Wind 1.5m Dyneema onto spool.
Tie Dyneema to cradle eyelet with double-bowline. Thread line through door-frame guide eyelet.
Connect door servo + winch motor to Node 3 (Panel D). Flash cargo_bay firmware.
Seal door lips with 1.5mm closed-cell foam tape. Verify 100% door seal when closed.
Functional test: command DOOR_OPEN → cradle descends 200mm → place test box → CRADLE_UP →
verify auto-latch click · DOOR_CLOSE → inspect seal. Repeat 5×.
Print tilt_bracket_140deg.stl (×2) replacing tilt_bracket_cf_petg.stl. Reinstall nacelle servos.
Bench check: −5° fwd stop · 0° forward datum · 90° VTOL detent · 120° soft mark · 140° aft stop.
In FC configurator: enable INDOOR_BRAKE mode. nacelle_brake_limit = 120°, nacelle_aft_stop = 140°, tilt_rate_brake = 20°/s.
Flight test: hover at 2m, command INDOOR_BRAKE → verify rearward motion ≤1m/s. Check altitude
hold (fuselage EDF maintains 2944g lift at 120° nacelle). Cancel → nacelles return to 90° in 2s.
Cargo gondola +14g · door servo +9g · winch cradle +10g · Dyneema +1g · sensors +26g · mounts +11g = +71g total
Dry mass 1413g · AUW empty 1823g (T/W 2.07) · AUW cargo w/ 6S 1800mAh: 1843g (T/W 2.05) — Rev I
Max box size: 4.0" × 3.0" × 3.0" (101.6 × 76.2 × 76.2 mm) · clearance 2mm each side
Max cargo mass: 250g · Winch rated load 350g (1.4× safety margin at 8N line tension)
Lower speed: 120mm/s · Raise speed: 80mm/s · Auto-latch load: 5N click force
© 2026 Steve Griffing, PE(CSE) CISSP-ISSEP CPP · CC BY 4.0 · Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity © Joss Whedon/Mutant Enemy/Universal — Fan engineering
